billing.title: Plans & billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and billing
billing.trialBanner: Your free trial ends in {days} days
billing.trialBannerGeneric: You are on a free trial
billing.graceBanner: Your trial has ended. Subscribe to keep access
billing.pastDueBanner: Payment failed. Update your payment method
billing.foundingPrice: Founding partner price, locked for life
billing.trialInfoCompact: Your free trial has {days} days remaining. Link a payment method to keep access after your trial ends.
billing.pastDueDescription: Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
billing.graceDescription: Your trial has ended. Subscribe within the next few days to keep full access to your account.
billing.confirmUpgradeDescription: You'll be moved from {from} (€{fromPrice}/mo) to {to} (€{toPrice}/mo). The price difference will be prorated for the rest of your current billing period.
billing.confirmDowngradeDescription: You'll be moved from {from} to {to}. A credit for the difference will be applied to your next invoice.
billing.downgradeImpactMembers: {affected, plural, one {1 of your {current} team members will lose scanning access} other {# of your {current} team members will lose scanning access}}
billing.downgradeImpactDesigns: {affected, plural, one {Your inactive card style will become read-only} other {Your {affected} inactive card styles will become read-only}}
billing.downgradeImpactCustomTemplates: {count, plural, one {# custom notification template} other {# custom notification templates}} will be paused
billing.downgradeImpactMilestonesAll: {disabled, plural, one {# milestone will be paused} other {# milestones will be paused}}
billing.downgradeImpactMilestonesCapped: {disabled, plural, one {# milestone will be paused} other {# milestones will be paused}} (you can keep {cap} per program)
billing.downgradeImpactScheduledBroadcasts: {count, plural, one {# scheduled broadcast} other {# scheduled broadcasts}} will be cancelled
billing.downgradeImpactStoreLocation: {count, plural, one {# notification uses your location and will be reset to the default message} other {# notifications use your location and will be reset to the default message}}
billing.sendBeforeDowngradeHint: These scheduled broadcasts will be cancelled. Send any you want to keep now, while your plan still allows it.

downgradeFeatureLost.notifications_broadcast: You won't be able to send broadcast messages to your customers
downgradeFeatureLost.notifications_type: Your notification messages will revert to defaults
downgradeFeatureLost.notifications_scheduled: You won't be able to schedule broadcasts in advance
downgradeFeatureLost.notifications_segmentation: You won't be able to target specific customer groups
downgradeFeatureLost.team_employee_tracking: Scan activity will no longer be tracked per employee

billing.downgradeReassurance: Your data is never deleted. If you upgrade again, everything will be fully restored.
billing.confirmCancelDescription: Your {plan} plan will remain active until {date}. After that, your account will switch to read-only mode: you'll still be able to view your data, but stamp scanning and customer management will be paused. You can reactivate anytime.
billing.cancelSuccess: Subscription cancelled. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period.
billing.endOfPeriod: the end of your billing period
billing.suspendedBannerTitle: Your account is in read-only mode
billing.suspendedBannerDescription: Stamp scanning and customer management are paused. Subscribe to restore full access. Your data is safe.
billing.trialSwitchHint: Your free trial continues. You won't be charged until it ends.
billing.prorationHint: You'll be charged or credited the difference for the remaining billing period.
billing.trialPlanSwitchNote: Switching plans won't reset your trial. Your free trial continues until {date}.
billing.trialSubscribeHint: Link your payment method now. Your free trial continues and you won't be charged until it ends.
billing.activeInTrialInfo: You're all set! Your free trial continues for {days} more days. Your first charge will be after the trial ends.
billing.billingStartsSoon: Your first billing is in {days} days, no action needed.
billing.invoiceHistoryDescription: View and download your past invoices from the billing portal.
billing.trialSidebarGrace: Trial ended. Subscribe to keep access
